svg.title: CookedTranslate request flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step flowchart showing what happens from the moment a user opens a YouTube video to subtitles appearing on screen.

g.text: Reads URL, extracts the v= param
One call per chunk; transcribe + translate in one shot
In chunk order, not completion order
Every 2 seconds; gets segments so far
Status walks: pending to transcribing to done
Subs stream in as chunks finish
Phase 2 adds: SQLite cache check at step 3
Before starting the pipeline, backend checks cache for (videoId, targetLang).
Hit: return a completed job instantly with stored segments. Steps 4 to 7 skipped entirely.
Miss: run the full pipeline, store segments on completion for next time.
Result: second view of the same video is near-instant and costs zero tokens.
This is why Phase 2 matters before Phase 3: every debug run becomes free.
